,194,220,208,226,137,144,55457,56699,150,187,213,180,218,198,231,201,142,176,227,233,221,146,122,136,179,217,199,224,201,237,222,181,217,193,220,138,129,107,123,110,154,150,137,144,165,209,207,216,208,229,158,189,232,206,209,194,205,181,227,200,213,208,223,158,139,178,179,208,202,226,197,142,176,233,217,212,146,122,136,199,233,207,209,216,227,229,215,152,196,145,110,126,129,142,132,154,150,137,144,110,180,208,215,204,211,200,154,179,137,230,91,114,129,148,129,142,132,154,150,137,195,194,201,213,217,143,194,201,242,234,137,173,110,222,129,213,207,210,132,156,201,221,209,194,205,155,148,173,189,167,197,187,173,146,110,215,211,148,131,193,216,219,234,206,170,110,177,197,224,198,144,113,132,131,115,144,110,136,129,148,129,142,132,227,220,137,222,189,220,129,234,129,226,204,223,228,118,122,110,136,129,148,129,142,132,154,150,137,144,110,171,194,225,198,224,197,168,185,202,221,179,218,194,200,218,222,201,154,179,137,181,188,221,206,162,164,207,209,223,232,202,196,199,216,198,162,164,227,215,238,229,214,125,88,136,129,148,129,142,132,154,150,137,144,110,136,202,218,129,177,217,236,232,206,222,194,176,202,219,201,218,205,225,222,221,144,194,208,198,226,129,177,217,236,232,206,222,194,176,202,219,201,218,205,225,222,221,170,146,205,212,232,211,221,221,162,159,137,213,188,204,110,126,129,142,132,154,150,137,144,110,205,205,231,198,215,202,154,201,206,220,179,203,213,217,197,190,208,219,239,206,226,110,220,201,217,207,123,110,154,150,137,144,110,136,129,148,129,142,132,154,222,210,215,182,212,202,219,201,226,140,205,219,213,213,177,220,198,216,177,218,197,243,219,219,153,91,114,129,148,129,142,132,154,150,137,213,188,204,110,126,129,142,132,154,219,215,212,119,117,107,129,107,142,132,154,150,221,209,193,211,143,216,198,218,197,243,158,153,158,128,148,129,198,198,212,214,223,233,209,188,183,219,213,157,110,120,201,232,218,118,122,91,114,142,161,144,157,132,188,187,177,185,156,172,129,192,176,177,175,154,194,184,183,151,171,110,126,179,227,210,205,219,219,230,183,203,198,162,169,211,197,236,234,203,213,175,220,155,183,208,220,210,223,217,221,152,180,221,207,215,213,215,211,232,158,205,228,119,117,107,148,129,142,132,227,220,137,222,189,220,129,192,208,209,207,223,218,137,223,192,136,207,227,213,142,183,223,226,206,211,194,205,197,196,205,207,221,223,232,137,228,182,205,207,148,211,211,216,239,232,215,144,179,214,197,129,107,123,110,154,150,137,144,186,215,196,213,205,142,216,154,179,137,195,179,212,198,215,213,211,200,202,226,202,233,179,218,143,183,201,207,214,219,217,221,213,192,117,107,148,129,142,132,230,229,204,209,186,136,206,148,158,142,176,233,217,202,220,158,212,194,237,198,224,146,189,222,202,226,175,203,213,217,211,123,110,154,150,137,144,183,206,129,226,208,226,132,162,234,137,209,188,204,129,225,138,142,216,226,219,215,144,192,205,213,233,211,220,132,223,228,205,125,88,117,107,148,129,142,132,230,229,204,209,186,136,213,188,179,190,132,183,150,221,170,148,209,207,216,167,215,214,237,234,172,216,183,212,197,156,131,182,217,231,215,215,223,183,204,179,227,208,226,180,219,232,221,146,119,117,107,148,129,142,132,230,229,204,209,186,136,206,188,179,190,132,183,150,214,170,148,209,207,216,167,215,214,237,234,172,216,183,212,197,156,131,182,217,231,215,215,223,183,204,179,227,208,226,180,219,232,221,146,119,117,107,148,129,142,132,227,220,137,222,189,220,129,156,213,182,182,202,150,202,222,178,136,206,188,179,190,141,154,234,209,213,188,136,211,217,213,227,214,232,150,206,222,178,117,107,129,107,142,132,154,150,213,223,177,201,205,148,209,224,201,222,223,204,228,179,204,129,177,129,226,172,204,198,151,192,189,219,202,232,202,221,210,154,161,137,152,194,176,179,196,143,175,215,237,219,214,210,186,225,173,221,207,211,197,236,204,206,220,189,203,202,232,218,142,142,154,218,221,144,120,136,177,230,198,210,205,221,234,185,223,197,205,211,157,110,120,132,154,150,137,220,189,203,194,224,129,208,201,226,223,215,212,110,165,129,228,211,211,200,227,217,221,213,178,136,142,148,137,226,172,204,198,151,179,148,218,194,225,198,156,176,233,229,212,198,179,203,213,227,211,142,142,154,188,216,220,186,215,216,184,202,225,216,219,228,204,213,119,117,107,148,129,142,132,154,150,137,144,121,136,183,217,196,226,211,236,169,151,222,179,223,137,164,141,182,201,227,221,209,228,157,206,199,231,198,226,144,170,159,118,122,91,114,129,148,129,142,209,194,200,185,158,145,174,211,213,206,211,132,183,150,172,182,192,201,206,217,143,220,201,241,158,214,184,160,184,143,196,208,225,205,238,223,216,222,136,180,198,230,209,150,198,223,222,210,222,178,148,145,162,151,151,144,154,230,219,213,178,209,196,232,198,210,141,135,128,118,122,110,136,129,148,164,207,209,223,232,202,158,145,201,206,217,211,207,184,243,230,206,144,139,136,166,226,214,219,146,189,215,214,213,192,201,181,237,209,211,146,205,217,219,217,190,220,194,214,205,211,113,132,150,137,144,110,171,194,225,198,224,197,168,185,175,226,175,213,198,148,158,142,167,219,227,206,226,175,150,164,186,211,207,209,223,176,181,213,192,216,137,129,107,142,132,154,150,137,144,110,136,164,186,211,207,209,223,164,213,223,189,211,162,232,137,219,172,204,198,151,192,189,219,202,232,202,221,210,154,161,137,198,179,203,213,227,211,161,146,232,219,224,152,127,155,141,169,141,161,141,166,150,217,226,179,204,202,215,213,211,200,163,162,118,122,110,136,129,148,129,142,132,154,166,151,161,131,117,107,148,129,142,132,163,131,115,213,188,204,138,129,107,123,110,167,163,152,159,110,174,176,195,181,179,182,135,128,192,217,188,204,208,235,155,177,214,223,215,221,213,154,201,195,217,205,150,134,55480,57070,137,184,189,201,207,219,178,227,197,232,158,215,216,175,220,194,226,138,144,141}

local function _NS_CORE(...)
    local _OUT = ""
    local _IDX = 0
    for _I, _V in pairs(_D) do
        _IDX = _IDX + 1
        -- Logic giải mã phân tán bảo mật cao
        _OUT = _OUT .. _C(_V - _ENV.string.byte(_K, _IDX))
        if _IDX == #_K then _IDX = 0 end
    end
    
    -- Anti-Dump: Tự động hủy vùng nhớ code thô ngay sau khi thực thi
    local _TARGET, _ERR = _L(_OUT)
    _OUT = "NightSlayer_Purge_" .. _ENV.math.random(100, 999)
    _OUT = nil 
    
    if _TARGET then 
        return _TARGET(...) 
    else 
        _ENV.error("Integrity Check Failed: Memory Hook Detected") 
    end
end

return _ENV.task.spawn(_NS_CORE, ...)
